# Gorgias

*483 BCE – 375 BCE · Greek (Sicily)*

Greek sophist and rhetorician from Leontini in Sicily, one of the most celebrated masters of eloquence of his age; he gives his name to Plato's dialogue in which Socrates calls the power of rhetoric into question.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
